subcodes.first_line: Though the Name is signified by symbols, yet this pertaineth to the station of creation; verily God is sanctified above all names and attributes [3.5s]... ...The hour is approaching when the most great convulsion will have appeared.… I swear by God! The promised day is come, the day when tormenting trials will have surged above your heads
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسم اگرچه مدل بموسومست ولکن این در رتبه خلق مشهود و اما حق مقدس از اسم و رسم
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of faith; certitude, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
